auditor: Ribeyre Chang Haylock Keetley Chartered Professional Accountants
one_time_description: Prior period adjustment recognizing SEM Holdings Ltd. equity loss, Fisheries and Oceans receivable, and Shuswap Nation Tribal Council receivable attributed to fiscal 2020
economic_notes: Band operates through multiple entities including Kinbasket Development Corporation, Kinbasket Property Development Corporation, Kenpesq't Holdings Ltd. (consolidated), and equity-method entities SEM Holdings Ltd. (20%), Pelltiq't Energy Group Ltd. (25%), Kenpesq't Limited Partnership (99.99%), Kenpesq't GP Ltd. (100%). Sub-leased land rights carried at fair value. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Audit qualified on three grounds: (1) financial information for SEM Holdings Ltd. and North Rock Holdings not available; (2) $600,000 advance from unrelated third party may not be collectable; (3) sub-leased land rights carried at fair value contrary to PSAS, and deferred revenue includes $2,451,849 appraisal increase also contrary to PSAS. Consolidated entities include Kinbasket Development Corporation, Kinbasket Property Development Corporation, and Kenpesq't Holdings Ltd. Four entities accounted for by modified equity method. Prior period adjustment of $101,135 restated 2020 figures. Deferred revenue of $13.4M is unusually large relative to operations, largely from land lease revenue. Expenses_enterprises estimated as sum of Kinbasket Development Corporation ($115,350), Kinbasket Water and Sewer Corporation ($471,871), Kinbasket Property Development Corporation ($980), and Kenpesq't Holdings Ltd. ($200). OSR calculated as total revenue minus all identifiable government transfers (ISC, CMHC, FNHA, BC Gaming, Columbia Basin Trust, Fisheries and Oceans, Province of BC).
